zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice de Wolvey於1283年出生在英國瓦維其可爾沃爾維時，她的父親Thomas De Wolvey Knight26歲，母親Alice Clinton24歲。她於1304年與Sir Giles Astley在英國瓦維其可爾沃爾維結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1345年在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾艾斯利享年62歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特塞頓 亞特 霍恩聖 約翰 馮 巴普蒂斯特 亞德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice de Wolvey于1283年出生在英国瓦維其可爾沃爾維时，她的父亲Thomas De Wolvey Knight26岁，母亲Alice Clinton24岁。她于1304年与Sir Giles Astley在英国瓦維其可爾沃爾維结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1345年在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾艾斯利享年62岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特塞頓 亞特 霍恩聖 約翰 馮 巴普蒂斯特 亞德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Wolvey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1 English: locative name, toponymic from Wolvey (Warwicks), or topographic from Middle English wolf ‘wolf’ + heie ‘hedge, enclosure’, perhaps for a person whose job it was to trap wolves or to protect other animals from them. Some of the early bearers may belong with (2).
2 English: relationship name from the Old English personal name Wulfgifu (f) ‘wolf‐gift’. See also Woolway .

variants.name: Woolway
meanings: English: relationship name from a Middle English descendant of Old English Wulfwīg ‘wolf‐war’. This might also have contributed to Wolvey .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice de Wolvey was born in 1283, in Wolvey, Warwickshire, England, her father, Thomas De Wolvey Knight, was 26 and her mother, Alice Clinton, was 24. She married Sir Giles Astley in 1304, in Wolvey, Warwickshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1345, in Astley, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 62, and was buried in Saint John the Baptist Churchyard, Sutton at Hone, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice de Wolvey est née en 1283, à Wolvey, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas De Wolvey Knight, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Alice Clinton, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Giles Astley en 1304, à Wolvey, Warwickshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1345, à Astley, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterrée à Saint John the Baptist Churchyard, Sutton at Hone, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Sie hat 1304 in Wolvey, Warwickshire, England Sir Giles Astley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. ja.lifeSummary: Alice de Wolveyが1283年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアウオルビーで生まれた時，父Thomas De Wolvey Knightは26歳，母Alice Clintonは24歳であった。1304年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアウオルビーでSir Giles Astleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1345年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアアストリーで62歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントスットオン アト ホーンサイント ジョン ス バプティスト チャーチヤルドにて埋葬された。

ko.Saint John The Baptist Churchyard, Wolve: 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 수턴 앳 호니 세인트 존 테 바프티스트 처르c히아어드
ko.lifeSummary: Alice de Wolvey(이)가 1283년 영국 워윅실르 울비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas De Wolvey Knight(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Clinton(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1304년 영국 워윅실르 울비에서 Sir Giles Astley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1345년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 애스틀리에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 수턴 앳 호니 세인트 존 테 바프티스트 처르c히아어드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Wolvey nasceu em 1283, em Wolvey, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas De Wolvey Knight, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Alice Clinton, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Giles Astley em 1304, em Wolvey, Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1345, em Astley, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 62 anos, e foi sepultada em Saint John the Baptist Churchyard, Sutton at Hone, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice de Wolvey родилась в 1283 г. в местности волви, варвиккшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas De Wolvey Knight было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Clinton, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Giles Astley в 1304 г. в местности волви, варвиккшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1345 г. в местности астли, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 62 лет и была похоронена в местности сеинт джон т баптист чурчярд, суттон ат хоун, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice de Wolvey nació en 1283, en Wolvey, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas De Wolvey Knight, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Alice Clinton, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Sir Giles Astley en 1304, en Wolvey, Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1345, en Astley, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultada en Saint John the Baptist Churchyard, Sutton at Hone, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
